name: @wc-toolkit/visual-studio
description: Visual Studio extension for the Web Components Language Server

scripts.pack: node -e "if(process.platform!=='win32'){console.error('VSIX packaging currently requires Windows with Visual Studio build tools. Use the release-visual-studio-vsix GitHub workflow or run pack on Windows.'); process.exit(1)}" && dotnet build WebComponentsLanguageServer.VisualStudio.csproj -c Release
scripts.release: echo 'Visual Studio extension published via GitHub Actions release workflow'

author: wc-toolkit
